message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Fabric Private Chaincode – Enclave registry – Current approach

actor "Admin" as Admin
participant "ECC" as ECC
participant "ERCC" as ERCC
participant "IAS" as IAS
participant "Orderer" as Orderer
participant "Peers" as Peers
participant "ECC_Enclave" as ECC_Enclave
participant "ERCC_VSCC" as ERCC_VSCC

note right of Peers: Drawbacks\n- Single-endorser policy only + Custom validation at every peer\n- ERCC must contact IAS (Internet connection and IAS credentials needed)\n- Current impl: No way to securely pass credentials to ERCC only\n- for EPID attestation SPID is needed when quote is created (ECC must provide this)

rectangle "instantiation" {
  Admin -> ECC: install
  Admin -> ECC: instantiate (expected_mrenclave)
  ECC -> ECC: putState(ecc.MRENCLAVE, expected_mrenclave)
  ECC --> Admin: success / error
}

Admin -> Orderer: submit instantiate transaction
Orderer -[hidden]-> Orderer: when next block ready
Orderer -> Peers: broadcast block
Peers -> Peers: Validation

rectangle "register new enclave" {
  Admin -> ECC: setup
  ECC -> ECC_Enclave: create
  ECC -> ECC_Enclave: getQuote(SPID)
  ECC_Enclave --> ECC: quote, ECC_s_pk
  ECC -> ERCC: register(quote, ECC_s_pk)
  ERCC -> IAS: send quote
  IAS --> ERCC: Attestation
  ERCC -> ERCC: putState(ercc.ECC_s_pk, Attestation)
  ERCC --> ECC: success / error
  ECC --> Admin: success / error
}

Admin -> Orderer: submit setup transaction
Orderer -[hidden]-> Orderer: when next block ready

rectangle "register validation" {
  Orderer -> Peers: broadcast block
  Peers -> Peers: Normal validation
  Peers -> ERCC_VSCC: Custom ERCC validation
  ERCC_VSCC -> ERCC_VSCC: expected_mrenclave = getState(ecc.MRENCLAVE)
  ERCC_VSCC -> ERCC_VSCC: check attestation signature
  ERCC_VSCC -> ERCC_VSCC: check attestation ECC_s_pk and mrenclave
}

@enduml
```
